=== info.txt

===================
===================
Bob Dylan
Entertainment Centre
Newcastle, New South Wales, Australia
2003.02.18

--------------------------------------------------------------------------
Lineage and taper: no info
volume fluctuation at the start of the first song. Tiny drop between cdr
Great sound
-------------------------------------------------------------------------

CD1
1 Tweedle Dee & Tweedle Dum (Bob on piano), 2 I'll Be Your Baby Tonight (Bob on piano and harp, Larry on pedal steel), 3 Highway 61 Revisited (Bob on piano), 4 It's All Over Now, Baby Blue (Bob on piano, Larry on pedal steel, Tony on standup bass), 5 Things Have Changed (Bob on piano), 6 The Wicked Messenger (Bob on harp), 7 Boots Of Spanish Leather (acoustic), 8 Masters Of War (acoustic), 9 Mama, You Been On My Mind (acoustic), 10 It's Alright, Ma (I'm Only Bleeding) (Bob on piano and harp, Larry on cittern), 11 Mr. Tambourine Man (acoustic) (Bob on piano),

CD2
1 Honest With Me (Bob on piano), 2 Moonlight (Bob on piano, Tony on standup bass), 3 Summer Days (Bob on piano, Tony on standup bass), (encore), 4 Blowin' In The Wind (acoustic), 5 All Along The Watchtower 



Concert # 1497 of The Never-Ending Tour. Concert # 7 of the 2003 Tour Down Under. 2003 concert # 7.
Concert # 7 with the 15th Never-Ending Tour Band: Bob Dylan (vocal & guitar), Bill Burnette (guitar), Larry Campbell (guitar, mandolin, pedal steel guitar & electric slide guitar), Tony Garnier (bass), George Receli (drums & percussion).

7-11, 15 acoustic with the band.
1-5, 10-14 Bob Dylan (piano).
2, 6, 10  Bob Dylan (harmonica).
2, 4 Larry Campbell (pedal steel guitar).
10 Larry Campbell (cittern).

7 new songs (43%) compared to previous concert. 3 new songs for this tour.
